scripts.db:status: node -e "require('dotenv').config(); const https=require('https'); const ref=(process.env.SUPABASE_URL||'').replace('https://','').split('.')[0]; const body=JSON.stringify({query:'SELECT filename,applied_at FROM public._migrations ORDER BY id'}); const opts={hostname:'api.supabase.com',path:'/v1/projects/'+ref+'/database/query',method:'POST',headers:{'Authorization':'Bearer '+process.env.SUPABASE_MANAGEMENT_TOKEN,'Content-Type':'application/json','Content-Length':Buffer.byteLength(body)}}; const req=https.request(opts,res=>{let d='';res.on('data',c=>d+=c);res.on('end',()=>{try{JSON.parse(d).forEach(r=>console.log(r.applied_at.slice(0,10)+' '+r.filename))}catch(e){console.log(d)}})}); req.write(body); req.end();"
